summary: Pre-deployment regression testing completed successfully. All features verified working in Emergent preview environment. Backend: 25/25 tests passed. Frontend: All critical flows working (homepage, article pages, admin login, search, education, author profiles).

minor.issue: Using fallback data when CoinGecko rate limited - EXPECTED behavior
minor.impact: No functional impact - fallback ticker data works correctly

minor.issue: Returns 500 when Cloudinary not configured - EXPECTED in dev environment
minor.impact: No impact - Cloudinary env vars not set in Emergent preview

passed_tests: Backend API Tests (25/25 - 100% pass rate)
GET /api/market/ticker - returns ticker data with crypto prices
GET /api/categories - returns 7 categories
GET /api/tags - returns tag list
GET /api/articles - returns paginated articles
GET /api/articles/by-slug/bitcoin-surges-past-100k-institutional-demand - returns full article with OG fields
GET /api/articles/homepage-sections - returns all sections (latest, crypto, press_releases, sponsored, others)
GET /api/articles/featured - returns hero_primary and hero_secondary
GET /api/articles/search?q=bitcoin - returns search results
POST /api/auth/login - admin login with correct credentials returns token
POST /api/auth/login - invalid credentials returns 401
GET /api/auth/me - without auth returns 401
GET /api/authors/{authorId} - returns author profile with articles
GET /api/sitemap.xml - returns valid XML sitemap
GET /api/pages - returns pages list
GET /api/pages/about - returns about page content
POST /api/contact - contact form submission works
Admin endpoints (articles, stats, users, homepage) - all working with auth
Homepage at / - loads with market ticker, Latest News, Crypto, Press Releases, Sponsored sections
Article page at /crypto/bitcoin-surges-past-100k-institutional-demand - renders with title, content, author, related articles
Admin login at /admin/login - login with petar010591@gmail.com / Zvezda2023! succeeds
Admin dashboard - shows stats (10 articles, 10 published, 7 categories, 1 team)
Navigation - clicking article card on homepage navigates to article page
Search page at /search?q=bitcoin - shows 5 search results
Education page at /education - loads with educational content cards
Author profile at /author/{authorId} - shows author info and 10 articles
seed_data_creation: None - using existing seeded data (10 articles, 7 categories, 8 tags)
context_for_next_testing_agent: Pre-deployment regression testing completed. All features verified working: homepage with market ticker and article sections, article pages with DOMPurify sanitized content, admin login and dashboard, search functionality, education page, author profiles. Backend 25/25 tests pass. App is ready for Railway deployment. Note: Cloudinary image upload will fail on Railway unless env vars are configured.

verified_features: Homepage content loading with all sections
Market ticker with live/fallback crypto prices
Article rendering with HTML content, OG meta tags
known_limitations: Cloudinary image upload requires env vars (CLOUDINARY_CLOUD_NAME, CLOUDINARY_API_KEY, CLOUDINARY_API_SECRET)
Market ticker uses fallback data when CoinGecko rate limited
deployment_readiness.railway_deployment_notes: Frontend Dockerfile serves static files with nginx. REACT_APP_BACKEND_URL must be set at Docker build time. CORS is set to allow_origins=['*'].
